case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. CHARLES L. JONES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RUBEN A. ALCARAZ FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL CONTRACT AND WAIVER OF ECXESS INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
